purpose: Generated-output proof for the strict repaired Wave70 mf70_nose mask after zoomed overlay review passed with notes.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: extremely subtle photoreal nose texture and contour preservation pass, preserve exact person identity, full visible nose bridge, sidewalls, tip, alae, nostril shape, natural skin texture, gaze direction, eye shape, iris color, pupil size, sclera tone, catchlights, cheeks, lips, philtrum, mouth shape, eyebrows, hairline, nearby hair occlusion, face lighting, white blazer, background, and portrait composition unchanged
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: identity change, different person, nose shape change, enlarged nose, narrowed nose, crooked nose, changed nostrils, asymmetrical nostrils, bulbous nose, pinched nose, nose bridge mutation, nose sidewall mutation, nose tip mutation, cheek shape change, lip shape change, mouth change, philtrum mutation, upper lip mutation, over-smoothed skin, plastic skin, waxy skin, skin tone change, gaze change, mismatched eyes, iris color change, glassy eyes, catchlight change, eyebrow change, hair mutation, visible seam, clothing change, background change, watermark, text

qa_focus: full visible nose bridge, sidewalls, tip, alae, and nostrils remain natural
no nose shape, cheek, lip, philtrum, or upper-lip drift
gaze, pupil, iris, sclera, and catchlights remain stable
mouth and cheeks do not mutate
no visible seam around repaired nose mask

source_qa_driver.change_summary: Use the strict repaired Wave70 nose mask with very low denoise to prove local generated-output routing while minimizing nose, nostril, cheek, lip, mouth, eye, and identity drift.
